allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); opts=d.get\(''streamingOptions'',{}\).get\(''us'',[]\); [print\(f""{o[''service''][''name'']}: {o[''type'']} ŌåÆ {o[''link'']}""\) for o in opts[:5]]")

Bash(node -e "require\(''dotenv''\).config\(\); console.log\(''STREAM_AVAIL_API_KEY set:'', !!process.env.STREAM_AVAIL_API_KEY\); console.log\(''Key starts with:'', process.env.STREAM_AVAIL_API_KEY?.substring\(0,10\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\(''fs''\); const html = fs.readFileSync\(''index.html'', ''utf-8''\); console.log\(''Lines:'', html.split\(''\\n''\).length\); console.log\(''initDiscoverCarousels calls:'', \(html.match\(/initDiscoverCarousels/g\)||[]\).length\); console.log\(''renderWatchlistCarousel calls:'', \(html.match\(/renderWatchlistCarousel/g\)||[]\).length\); console.log\(''renderLovedCarousel calls:'', \(html.match\(/renderLovedCarousel/g\)||[]\).length\); console.log\(''data-search-title count:'', \(html.match\(/data-search-title/g\)||[]\).length\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\(''fs''\); const html = fs.readFileSync\(''index.html'', ''utf-8''\); console.log\(''Lines:'', html.split\(''\\n''\).length\); console.log\(''resetDiscover:'', \(html.match\(/resetDiscover/g\)||[]\).length\); console.log\(''loadItemDirect:'', \(html.match\(/loadItemDirect/g\)||[]\).length\); console.log\(''data-carousel-item:'', \(html.match\(/data-carousel-item/g\)||[]\).length\); console.log\(''initDiscoverCarousels:'', \(html.match\(/initDiscoverCarousels/g\)||[]\).length\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\(''fs''\); const html = fs.readFileSync\(''index.html'', ''utf-8''\); console.log\(''Lines:'', html.split\(''\\n''\).length\); console.log\(''renderCarouselItem\(item, true\):'', \(html.match\(/renderCarouselItem\\\(item, true\\\)/g\)||[]\).length\); console.log\(''renderCarouselItem\(item\):'', \(html.match\(/renderCarouselItem\\\(item\\\)[^,]/g\)||[]\).length\); console.log\(''carousel-item-actions:'', \(html.match\(/carousel-item-actions/g\)||[]\).length\);")
